desc: Minimal + Safe: tree-shake main, enforce via gitsafe + branch protections, archive full codebase.

start.desc: Baseline: current recursive-locked state. Target: hardened main with gitsafe enforcement.

archive-full-codebase.desc: Create archive/full-codebase branch from current HEAD. Preserves entire codebase for reference.

create-enforcement-config.desc: Create .roadmap/enforcement.json: gitsafe denylist, branch rules, allowed files, audit trail.

tree-shake-main.desc: Delete non-essential files from main: docs/, tests/, examples/, legacy src/lib/ subdirs. Keep only 10-15 core files.

integrate-gitsafe.desc: Load enforcement.json in CLI. Route all file reads through gitsafe with denylist + size limits.

test-gitsafe-enforcement.desc: Tests: gitsafe rejects denylist paths, enforces maxBytes, validates on main branch only.

setup-branch-protections.desc: Configure GitHub: main immutable, require status checks, require reviews, auto-delete branches after merge.

verify-minimal-surface.desc: Verify main has only essential files (< 50 files total, gitsafe can enumerate all).

test-immutability.desc: Verify main cannot be pushed to directly, only via PR. Pre-commit hook blocks DAG edits outside feat/wip.

document-branch-architecture.desc: Create .roadmap/BRANCHES.md: document main (canonical), archive/full-codebase (snapshot), develop (experimental) relationship.

setup-git-refs.desc: Create git tags (hardening-001-baseline) and refs marking canonical state, archive snapshot, branch relationships.

enforce-main-reads.desc: Add CLI validation: verify all file reads are from main (not current branch). Update bin/roadmap.ts.

hardened-locked.desc: Hardening complete: minimal main (15 files), gitsafe enforced, branch protections active, archive preserved, main-read enforced.
